slides.title: The Problem
slides.content: Millions of people use physical TENS devices for chronic pain, but lack a digital companion for therapy optimization and outcomes tracking.

slides.title: The Solution
slides.content: A dual-app ecosystem connecting patients + clinicians with real-time monitoring, personalized insights, and robust safety checks.

slides.title: Market Opportunity
slides.content: Bridging the gap between $2B TENS device market and digital health tracking for chronic pain management.

slides.title: Key Features
slides.content:
✅ Real-time patient-clinician sync
✅ Contraindication safety checks
✅ Privacy-focused role-based access
✅ Progress analytics
✅ Clinical-grade UI/UX

slides.title: Technology
slides.content: React 19 + Firebase + TypeScript for modern, reliable, and secure data handling.

slides.title: Traction
slides.content: Working prototype demonstrating live session telemetry and comprehensive clinician dashboards.
